hero_subtitle: SFTY organizes jurisdiction-specific Travel Rule messaging, exception handling, case management and audit evidence into one connected compliance workflow for regulated digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule workflows remain disconnected and manual
problem_description: VASPs struggle to integrate jurisdiction-specific Travel Rule requirements across multiple providers and regulatory frameworks. This fragmentation slows review processes, complicates exception handling and weakens audit readiness for Travel Rule compliance obligations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY combines jurisdictional Travel Rule data, provider outputs, exception cases and regulatory updates into one workflow, enabling VASPs to streamline reviews, handle exceptions and maintain audit evidence effectively.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule events to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes Travel Rule messages through routing, exception handling, case creation and evidence preservation for efficient compliance review workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond Travel Rule messages. Evidence-ready workflows
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASPs a provider-neutral layer that turns Travel Rule data into structured workflows, cases, decisions, linked evidence, and audit-ready reporting.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs handling FATF Travel Rule workflows with governed provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment controls from initial setup onward.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY about managing FATF Travel Rule workflows

ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how Travel Rule evidence supports audit-ready compliance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures Travel Rule data, routing, exceptions and jurisdiction-specific policies into connected workflows for VASPs and regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY manages message generation, routing, status tracking, exception handling and case creation within a single operational compliance workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-grade case history, decision logs and supporting evidence for Travel Rule events to support review and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects multiple Travel Rule providers’ outputs into a controlled layer without disrupting existing systems or operational procedures.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but connects and orchestrates their outputs into structured reviews, cases and reporting workflows.
final_title: Structure FATF Travel Rule workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY supports jurisdiction-specific Travel Rule messaging, exception handling, case management and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
